title: 10pc Universal Tool High Speed Steel Titanium Mini Router Drill Bits
description:
The 10pc Mini Router Bits Set is a great addition to any hobbyist's tool collection. This set of drill bits are ideal for carpentry, home improvement, crafts and endless other projects. Each drill is constructed of high speed steel and is titanium coated. They are all compatible with Dremel tools, and each has a 1/8" 3mm shank. This set of drill bits comes in a sturdy wooden box for easy transportation and storage while not in use. Grab a set of these bits before your next project, or gift them to your favorite carpenter!
